{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Union space
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] must return to [[Union space]] to retrieve their people.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21">''The Pilot'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
